test.description: FAIL-BY-DESIGN regression guard for bug G1: odd-length-short hash (63 hex) MUST be rejected. Geth returns -32602 'hex string of odd length'. Nethermind v1.38.0-rc silently left-pads with a leading 0 nibble, parses a valid 32-byte hash and returns result:null (or a DIFFERENT real tx), so it FAILS this guard until fixed. Expected: PASS on Geth, FAIL on NM.
